chunks.content: Document 5 chunk 0: API design principles ensure consistent and intuitive service interfaces.
Document 5 chunk 1: REST endpoints use HTTP methods to perform resource operations.
Document 5 chunk 2: GraphQL queries allow clients to request specific data structures.
Document 5 chunk 3: API versioning strategies maintain backward compatibility with clients.
Document 5 chunk 4: Rate limiting protects APIs from excessive traffic and abuse.
Document 5 chunk 5: API documentation tools generate interactive reference materials.
Document 5 chunk 6: Webhook integrations push event notifications to subscribed endpoints.
Document 5 chunk 7: API gateways provide centralized routing and policy enforcement.
Document 5 chunk 8: OAuth tokens authorize third-party applications to access user data.
Document 5 chunk 9: API testing frameworks validate endpoint behavior and response formats.
